products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Top-rated in Altroconsumo's March 2025 capsule test
Compatible with a wide range of Dolce Gusto machines
Offers a variety of flavors at affordable price points

products.name: Nespresso
pros: Highest-rated in Altroconsumo's March 2025 capsule test
Offers premium quality and diverse flavor options

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s March 2025 capsule coffee test recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as the best options, citing quality, machine compatibility and price.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
